chunks.text: EECS Undergraduate Newsletter | November 15, 2024. This newsletter provides updates and information for EECS undergraduate students at UC Berkeley. It includes announcements about academic deadlines, upcoming events, and opportunities for students to engage with the department and community.

Key topics covered in this issue include reminders about course registration deadlines, information on faculty office hours, and details about student club activities. Students are encouraged to check the newsletter regularly for the latest news and resources to support their academic and professional development.

The newsletter also highlights upcoming events such as workshops on resume building, networking sessions with alumni, and technical talks by industry professionals. These events aim to help students gain practical skills and connect with potential employers in the EECS field.

Additionally, the newsletter provides information on open faculty positions within the EECS department, encouraging interested candidates to apply. It serves as a resource for students to stay informed about department news and opportunities throughout the academic year.
